description: Replacing the served model version in place with no canary or rollback, turning a regression into a full outage.
body: Failure mode: a new model artifact is swapped into the live server without health check, canary, or a retained previous version, so a corrupt or regressed model degrades every request and cannot be quickly reverted. Detection signals: quality or latency drops sharply right after a deploy; there is no prior version loaded to fall back to; no canary metrics exist. Do not swap models in place blindly. Safer fallback: health-check and canary the new version, ramp gradually while watching metrics, and keep the previous version loaded for instant rollback.
